creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD Foundation:
 I downloaded the FreeBSD logo from the FreeBSD website and used it to
create the backside of a card image that can be used in the
games/kdegames3 port.  Would it be OK to add this image to the
games/kdegames3 port?

Scot
-- 
DISCLAIMER:
No electrons were mamed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
